idea.title: Deck of Dread
idea.hook: Draw a hand of spell-cards, read the monster's next move, then blast it before it strikes — win to loot a new card and face something worse. How deep can your deck go?
idea.prototype: Mobile-portrait roguelite spell-card battler: tap cards to strike/block a single telegraphed monster, win to loot a card + descend; ~24-card pool + relic blessings; endless escalating depth.
idea.mutation_of: roguelite deckbuilder (Slay-the-Spire-lite) adapted to a clear mobile-portrait monster-card battler
idea.why_novel: first true roguelite spell-card battler in the portfolio; card is our 2nd-highest-retention genre (108s/play) but only thinly built

sources.title: card = 2nd-highest retention (108s/play); danger_combat is the #3 live CTR archetype; survivor-like (devourling) is our #1 7-day performer so monster-combat lands
sources.snippet: Built as the highest-retention-ceiling fresh lane: card/deckbuilder, telegraphed-intent clarity, mobile-portrait.

synthesizer_brief: Leader picked a roguelite spell-card battler as the single strongest high-retention-ceiling buildable idea for 2026-06-02 PM: merge/cleaning/tycoon saturated, survivor-like already built (devourling), card under-built but 2nd-best retention. Clarity (the portfolio's #1 complaint) enforced via telegraphed enemy intent + tiny deck + tutorial.

alternatives.title: Spell-Lane Defense
alternatives.why_novel: auto-battler lane defense — rejected, adjacent to merge_defense/tower_defense which our data dislikes (33%)

alternatives.title: Balatro-lite poker score-chaser
alternatives.why_novel: higher addiction ceiling but poker-hand literacy is a clarity risk for the RU/portal audience

alternatives.title: 10th cleaning game with depth
alternatives.why_novel: safest (cleaning 94% liked) but low ceiling + saturated (9 cleaning games already)
